name: AnalysisAreaPolygon
summary: The AnalysisAreaPolygon class contains information related to analysis area polygons.

constructors.name: AnalysisAreaPolygon
constructors.summary: Creates a new instance of the AnalysisAreaPolygon class.

methods.name: Add
methods.summary: Adds a position to the analysis area polygon. Also adds an edge.

methods.name: GetEdges
methods.summary: Gets the edges of the area polygon.

methods.name: GetPositions
methods.summary: Gets the positions of the area polygon.

methods.name: Insert
methods.summary: Inserts an analysis area polygon. The AnalysisModelName has to be set.

methods.name: Select
methods.summary: Selects an analysis area polygon. The AnalysisObjectType has to be set.

properties.name: AnalysisModelName
properties.summary: Gets or sets the analysis model name.

properties.name: AnalysisObjectType
properties.summary: Gets or sets the type of the analysis object.

properties.name: Edges
properties.summary: The edges of the area polygon.

properties.name: FatherObject2ID
properties.summary: Gets or sets the identifier of the father part.

properties.name: FatherObject2Type
properties.summary: Gets or sets the type of the father object.

properties.name: FatherObjectID
properties.summary: Gets or sets the identifier of the father part.

properties.name: FatherObjectType
properties.summary: Gets or sets the type of the father object.

properties.name: ID
properties.summary: Gets or sets the identifier of the analysis object.

properties.name: Positions
properties.summary: The positions of the area polygon.
